blockers: Steward brief path .scion-ops/sessions/20260511t115659z-57a1/brief.md was not present in the workspace; implementation used the user-provided Group A scope plus the OpenSpec proposal, design, tasks, and delta spec.
summary: Implemented Group A data-contract work for better-information-ui: normalized timeline rows now include entry_id, sequence, timestamp, agent, action, handoff, reason_for_handoff, status, source, and detail while preserving existing keys; overview data now includes readiness_strip, priority_attention, recent_activity, and source_health; exact replay timeline ids are suppressed without collapsing distinct same-agent or same-pair handoffs. Added focused no-spend fixture tests and updated completed task checkboxes only for this slice. Branch was pushed to origin.

1.5 Preserve distinct repeated handoff entries while suppressing exact replay duplicates with the same stable source identity.
1.8 Keep legacy raw HTML/JavaScript changes limited to a compatibility bridge for normalized timeline fields.

1.13 Run relevant web app fixture and static checks.
